title: Elevated Nourishment
subtitle: Supporting increased energy demands
description: As you enter the third trimester, your body’s energy needs increase further. You may notice more fatigue, making it important to focus on energy-dense foods, slightly larger portions, and consistent hydration.
what_to_expect: Higher hunger levels or need for larger portions
Greater importance of sustained energy and hydration
nutrition_focus: Increase portion sizes gradually if comfortable
Maintain consistent hydration throughout the day
recommended_foods: Balanced meals like dal, roti, rice, sabzi, and salad
Fruits like banana, apple, orange, guava, and pomegranate
Vegetables including spinach, beetroot, carrots, beans, and broccoli
Healthy snacks like nuts, roasted chana, fruit bowls, or curd
Protein and calcium sources like milk, paneer, lentils, eggs, or chicken (if preferred)
hydration: Drink water frequently throughout the day
Include fluids like buttermilk, coconut water, lemon water, or light soups
reassurance: Nourishing your body well helps support your energy and comfort during this phase.

diabetes.personalized_description: Balanced meals with controlled portions support stable energy and blood sugar levels.
nutrition_focus: Balance carbohydrates with protein and fiber
Avoid sudden increases in portion sizes
recommended_foods: Whole grains like oats and brown rice
Protein-rich foods like lentils, paneer, and nuts
diabetes.reassurance: Balanced and controlled meals help maintain stability.

anemia.personalized_description: Increased focus on iron-rich foods supports energy and helps manage fatigue.
nutrition_focus: Pair meals with vitamin C sources
foods_to_limit: Tea or coffee immediately after meals
anemia.reassurance: Consistent iron intake supports your strength and energy.

hypertension.personalized_description: Balanced meals and proper hydration support stable blood pressure.
hypertension.reassurance: Balanced routines support a calm and steady state.

thyroid.personalized_description: Consistent meals and hydration support metabolic balance and energy.
thyroid.reassurance: Consistency supports your body's natural rhythm.

multi_condition_blend.combined_message: When managing multiple conditions, focusing on balanced meals, portion control, and hydration helps maintain strength and stability.
priority_nutrition: Maintain regular meal and snack timings
Stay well hydrated throughout the day
multi_condition_blend.reassurance: Steady nourishment and hydration support your overall well-being.
